transport_contract.authentication: JavaScript split-space second segment of exactly 36 bytes selects API-key lookup regardless of scheme; otherwise host-only browser session
transport_contract.authorization: bootstrap/list use the actor and active organization; detail/download/playback/delete require owner and disclose every foreign or absent target as 404
transport_contract.body: all six routes are bodyless; Content-Type, transfer encoding, non-identity content encoding, nonzero Content-Length, and Idempotency-Key are rejected

bootstrap_contract.organizations: active non-tombstoned owned or active-member organizations; owner role wins, then admin, then member
bootstrap_contract.active_selection: current active organization when accessible, otherwise the first accessible organization, otherwise null
bootstrap_contract.root_folders: actor-created, null-parent, null-space folders in the selected organization with owner-scoped video counts
bootstrap_contract.images: Google lh3 URLs pass through; path-style R2 URLs drop the bucket segment and raw keys become private one-hour GET capabilities; nonextractable URLs pass through; any user/org image failure fails bootstrap

list_contract.page: Number(value), finite and >=1, Math.trunc, default 1, max 10000
list_contract.limit: Number(value), finite and >=1, Math.trunc, default 20, max 50
list_contract.folder: truthy folderId selects exactly that folder; absent/empty selects null folder and includes rootFolders
list_contract.best_effort: analytics failures produce zero and thumbnail failures produce null

detail_contract.metadata: only object metadata; nonempty string summary and ordered chapters whose title is string and start is number
detail_contract.comments: all text/emoji rows ordered by createdAt with per-author image failures mapped to null

storage_contract.range: Range is intentionally not signed, so the mobile player may request arbitrary byte ranges on the exact signed object
storage_contract.download: screenshots use newest matching screenshot suffix; webMP4 prefers nonempty result.mp4 then raw fallback; other MP4 uses result.mp4; non-MP4 is 404
storage_contract.transcript: prefix/transcription.vtt is signed only when HEAD succeeds; every HEAD/sign failure yields null

delete_contract.ordering: owner-scoped D1 deletion/tombstone commits before one R2 prefix listing/deletion
delete_contract.provider_failure: returns 500 after D1 deletion; an ordinary retry returns 404
delete_contract.evidence: immutable operation/audit rows plus guarded authority, tombstone, and cleanup assertions
